0.name: Prof. Candice
0.text: Alright, that's good enough. Thank you... Colin.

1.name: Colin
1.text: I swear if there was more time I-

2.name: Prof. Candice
2.text: Anyway, as you guys may have seen, mass has a significant effect on the force need to move an object.

3.name: Prof. Candice
3.text: We'll have your assessment on this topic in the following week, as per usual. You are now dismissed!

4.name: Prof. Candice
4.text: As for you, Colin, I'll see you in the afternoon...
